name: BITS Job Network Connection via Bitsadmin.exe
description: Detects network connections initiated directly by `bitsadmin.exe`. Adversaries may abuse this legitimate Windows service to download or upload malicious payloads, establish command and control (C2), or maintain persistence on a system, often bypassing some network defenses.

prompts.prompt: A suspicious network connection was initiated directly by `bitsadmin.exe` on the host **{computer_name}**. The process, running under user **{user}**, connected to the destination **{destination_hostname}** (**{destination_ip}**:{destination_port}) with the command line **{command_line}**. This activity is a known technique for **Defense Evasion** and **Command and Control** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1197**). Although `bitsadmin.exe` is a legitimate tool, direct network connections are highly suspicious. Immediate investigation is required to determine if this is a benign administrative task or a malicious file transfer. Analyze the destination and the full command line to assess the threat.

parameters.name: destination_hostname
parameters.description: The destination hostname of the network connection.

parameters.name: destination_ip
parameters.description: The destination IP address of the network connection.

parameters.name: destination_port
parameters.description: The destination port of the network connection.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line of the bitsadmin.exe process.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process ran.

parameters.name: computer_name
parameters.description: The name of the computer where the event occurred.
